description.value: Price +1 bonus; Aura faint transmutation; CL 4th; Weight â DESCRIPTION When an inquisitor wielder uses her judgment class ability while wielding a jurist weapon, it grants her an enhancement bonus on her Perception checks and to CMD. The bonus is +1 on the first round of her judgment, and increases by +1 each round, to a maximum of +3 on the third and following rounds. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells owl’s wisdom; Cost +1 bonus
